_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-11 11:07:23Z)**_

**Checklist**
- Selected node handoff: expose a formal selection contract from the composite preview to the editor host so the app can receive at least `cardFile + nodeId + cardType + pluginId + title` when a base-card node is picked; this is required by the editor design, but the current public composite surface only covers preview/render and `ready/node-error/fatal-error`, not selection. `生态设计原稿/14-编辑引擎设计.md:21` `归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md:1590` `生态共用技术文档/组件库/07-复合卡片窗口与SDK显示链路标准.md:71` `Chips-SDK/src/api/card.ts:159`
- Editor-panel mount route: publish a real Host+SDK entry to render a base-card editor for `(cardFile, nodeId)` and return the editor document/frame plus protocol metadata; the plugin-side editor entry already exists as `renderBasecardEditor(ctx)`, and Host already has internal `renderBaseCardEditor(...)`, but it is not exposed as a formal route. `Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/src/index.ts:11` `Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/docs/technical/01-架构设计.md:100` `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:858` `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts:2542`
- Canonical base-card read/write routes: expose public `getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` and `updateBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId, config)`-style actions so the engine can load the selected node’s real config and commit edits without rewriting `.card` structure itself; Host already has internal implementations, while the current public card service only registers `parse/render/validate`. `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:779` `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:793` `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts:2542` `项目日志与笔记/工单029-EDITING-ENGINE-BASECARD-EDITOR-CONTRACT-GAP/任务说明.md:41`
- Autosave event contract: freeze the editor->host change payload around config changes (`nodeId/cardType/pluginId/config`) so the engine can debounce dirty-state saves and refresh preview after save; this matches both the archived product flow and Host’s internal editor iframe prototype. `归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md:1628` `归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md:2021` `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:496`
- Undo/redo sync back into editor UI: make the reverse sync path formal so the engine can push canonical config back into the mounted editor after undo, redo, or save rollback; Host’s internal prototype already suggests `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` -> `chips.basecard-editor:config-synced`, but SDK/public docs do not expose it yet. `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:519` `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:523` `归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md:2131`
- Iframe/editor-panel lifecycle and security: keep the editor isolated and Host-owned, with theme CSS injection, `ready`/`fatal-error` lifecycle events, unload disposal, and source+origin-filtered messaging expectations matching the existing composite iframe model; do not use `module.mount` as the fallback until the SDK/Host contract drift is fixed. `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:452` `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts:510` `Chips-SDK/src/api/card.ts:276` `Chips-SDK/src/api/module.ts:10` `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts:1798`
